Barret Zoph is out at OpenAI again after just five months
digest.tldr: Five months after returning to OpenAI, Barret Zoph - the company's head of enterprise AI sales - has departed, The Verge has learned.  Zoph returned to OpenAI in mid-January after a stint as co-founder and CTO of…
